subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! We have indeed made mention of thee aforetime and have shown thee the manifest and straight path of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا احمد قد ذکرناک من قبل و عرفناک سبیل الله الواضح المستقیم
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
